app_title: Buğra Kaan Sağlam | Senior Mobile Software Engineer

hero.title: Building production mobile systems with Flutter and .NET MAUI.
hero.subtitle: Senior mobile software engineer focused on scalable architecture, production-ready UI, backend integrations, offline-first apps, notifications, barcode systems, and release compliance.
hero.status: Building mobile systems end to end, from architecture and backend integrations to store-ready releases.

about.body: Senior Mobile Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience developing cross-platform applications with Flutter and .NET MAUI. Experienced in designing, developing, publishing, and maintaining production mobile applications on the App Store and Google Play. Strong background in mobile architecture, REST API integrations, offline-first applications, state management, push notifications, barcode scanning systems, and enterprise software development.
